notes: Solid, feature-rich Breakout implementation with multi-level progression, particle effects, audio, attract mode, and reinforced/indestructible bricks; minor quirk where LIFE_LOST state decrements lives after a delay but ball disappears immediately, and the score-pop transform math has a minor offset bug, but overall plays very well.

An exceptionally well-crafted Breakout clone with perfect arcade mechanics, progressive difficulty, particle effects, and sound; the only minor flaw is that keyboard and mouse inputs can fight each other if switching between them.
A solid and polished Breakout clone with working core loop and controls, but it is not flawless due to some questionable collision/state edge cases and a few nonessential design oddities.
